title: TFMG - Warium Kerosene converter
description: Fix fuel incompatibility – TFMG kerosene now works with Warium!
body:
# Kerosene Converter

Have you ever tried using [Create: The Factory Must Grow](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-tfmg) kerosene in [Warium](https://modrinth.com/mod/warium) or [VS Warium](https://modrinth.com/mod/valkyrien-warium) and realized it just doesn't work? Frustrating, right?

This mod fixes that problem by adding a **Kerosene Converter**! Simply place this block in your world, and it will convert TFMG kerosene into Warium kerosene automatically. Now you can power all your planes from [Valkyrien Skies x Clockwork](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-clockwork) using **just one fluid tank** instead of having two separate fluid tanks.

## How to use

1. Pump TFMG kerosene into **any side except the front**.
2. Wait while the converter does its work.
3. Extract fresh Warium kerosene from the **front**.

Now you can enjoy flying your planes at full speed with Warium VS jet engines!

**Report bugs or issues on the [issue tracker](https://github.com/przyg/kerosene-coneverter-mod/issues)**

This mod is compatible with [Valkyrien Skies](https://modrinth.com/mod/valkyrien-skies) and [Clockwork](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-clockwork), and works especially well on planes.

Aluminum texture is used from [Create: The Factory Must Grow](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-tfmg)
